name: pedaldata-bot
description: Bot WhatsApp + Gemini + GitHub para blog de ciclismo automático

scripts.validate:frontmatter: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const d='../_posts';fs.readdirSync(d).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.md')).forEach(f=>{const c=fs.readFileSync(p.join(d,f),'utf8');const m=c.match(/^---\n([\s\S]*?)\n---/);if(!m)console.log('Sem frontmatter:',f);else if(!m[1].includes('layout:'))console.log('Sem layout:',f);else if(!m[1].includes('title:'))console.log('Sem title:',f)})
